description: Create a GitHub Actions CD workflow that triggers on push events. The workflow should have three jobs: build-linux-win, build-linux-release, and macosx-bintray. The build-linux-win job should run on ubuntu-latest, install MXE dependencies, configure and build the project, and package it for Windows. The build-linux-release job should run on ubuntu-16.04, install dependencies, configure and build the project, and package it for Linux. The macosx-bintray job should run on macos-latest, install dependencies, configure and build the project, and package it for Mac OS X.
